title: ‘Zootopia 2’ Gets Disney+ Streaming Date
author: Jonathan Zavaleta
fullText:
Disney’s Zootopia 2 will be available on March 11, while the physical release is out now
 
 If you purchase an independently reviewed product or service through a link on our website, Rolling Stone may receive an affiliate commission.

 Zootopia 2 was one of the biggest box-office hits of 2025, and now it has a streaming date. Disney announced today that it will be streaming on Disney+ on March 11. Physical media fans can also pick up the Blu-ray and DVD as of today.

 The ad-supported Disney+ and Hulu bundle starts at $12.99/mo. The streaming service does not offer a free trial. 

 Zootopia 2‘s record-setting box office run has made it the ninth highest-grossing movie of all time, according to Box Office Mojo, as well as the highest-grossing animated Motion Picture Association (MPA) movie of all time. It was also nominated for Best Animated Feature at this year’s Academy Awards.

 Zootopia 2 was one of the major drivers of Disney’s box office success last year; the studio also released films like Avatar: Fire and Ash, Lilo & Stitch, and Predator: Badlands. This year, Disney will also distribute the animated Pixar films Hoppers and Toy Story 5, as well as a live-action version of Moana. 

 Zootopia 2 follows Ginnifer Goodwin as a rabbit cop, Judy Hopps, and Jason Bateman as a fox, Nick Wilde, as they seek to uncover a reptilian mystery. Zootopia 2 was directed by Jared Bush and Byron Howard. 

 The home release will include a wide variety of extras, including making-of featurettes and deleted scenes. You can check out a bonus feature below, which highlights the work of Disney’s animators as they bring the characters from concept art to the big screen.

 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 Zootopia 2 
 

 
 
 

 

 
 For physical media enthusiasts, Zootopia 2 is available on 4K Ultra HD, Blu-ray, and DVD, as well as a limited-edition Steelbook as of March 3.
summary: Disney’s Zootopia 2 will be available on March 11, while the physical release is out now
